criteria.criterion: A unit test in `tests/unit/test_eval_scorers.py` globs every packaged eval spec and asserts `validate_eval_spec(spec)` is clean, plus `validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True)` clean for every dataset-bearing spec; it is collected by the default (non-integration, non-external) suite.
The redundant inline validation step is removed from `.github/workflows/prompt-eval.yml`.
The new test fails if any dataset-bearing packaged spec lacks a gold_set (verified by a local red→green check), and passes on current `main`.

citation.description: Operator attestation in ticket comment: Gerrit change 836 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/836), submitted as commit 00a0c149a with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (0 unresolved comments); Prompt Eval workflow run for that commit concluded success; local lint and typecheck passed.

criteria.criterion: `make lint` and the eval test suite pass; the `Prompt Eval` and `Verified` gates are green.
